element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player controls pink submarine with missile weapons from start
Required to destroy alien facilities and free captured humans
Must discharge survivors at islands to gain power-ups and fuel replenishment
Constant resource pressure; failure results in life loss
Active threat requiring evasion alongside offensive action
Optional; colliding with mermaid reveals hidden banner message from aliens
Destroying all bases across loops triggers regional message variants

typical_relief_triggers: Successfully docking at island to discharge human survivors
Fuel tank replenishment after rescue discharge
Destroying enemy facilities and freeing captured humans
typical_tension_triggers: Submarine at maximum human capacity (9) unable to collect more
Facility defense against ice ball attacks
Mermaid encounter (alternate tension path with hidden bonus stakes)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Continuous resource management tension interspersed with facility destruction objectives and rescue discharge relief cycles

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Mermaids present optional hidden bonus messages without blocking progression
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Collision with mermaid during level triggers banner message from aliens; discoverable across any loop

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of simultaneous resource management (fuel, human capacity) and evasion; manageable alien density
difficulty_curve.late_game: Three distinct loops available; escalating challenge implied by multi-loop structure
notable_spikes: Loop transitions (game repeats with sustained difficulty across 3 total loops)
Level 7 to Level 8 transition (Level 8 functions as final sequence before loop restart)

notable_level_patterns.description: Collect captured humans from destroyed facilities (max 9), navigate to island discharge point, release to gain power-ups and fuel, repeat per level
Culmination of each level involves destroying the alien base command structure; destruction status tracked across loops for ending variant
Optional collision with mermaid during standard level play triggers hidden alien banner message, available on any difficulty loop
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Any level 1-7 (regional message variants on loops 2-3)

notable_level_patterns.description: Game completes at Level 7 but restarts; three total loops possible. Final loop completion with all bases destroyed triggers regional surrender message variant (Japan: Ottoto aliens, US: Neptunians)
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Level 7 completion triggers loop restart; Level 8 is final sequence
